---
execute:
  freeze: false
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    \usepackage{fvextra}
    \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
---

# Advanced Methods & AI

## Markov Chains and Hidden Markov Models

{{< include _markov.qmd >}}


## LLM Agents

{{< include LLM-Agents/LLM-Agents.qmd >}}

## Animation

{{< include _animation.qmd >}}

## Natural Language Processing
